calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Mtn To Amend The Judgment To Include Andrew Kek H. Lim And E. Francisco Mayren Revocable Living Trust Dated Apr 18, 18
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE'JUDGMENT CREDITOR NDS, LLC'S Motion To Amend The Judgment To Include Andrew Kek H. Lim And E. Francisco Mayren as Trustees of the Andrew Kek H. Lim and E. Francisco Mayren Revocable Living Trust Dated April 18, 2016.

Judgment creditor/Assignee NDS, LLC's motion to amend the judgment to included Andrew Kek H. Lim and E. Francisco Mayren, as Trustees of the Andrew Kek H. Lim and E. Francisco Mayren Revocable Living Trust Dated April 18, 2016 is denied without prejudice to being refiled. There is no proof of service on Mr. Mayren.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Mtn To Amend The Judgment To Include Andrew Kek H. Lim And E. Francisco Mayren Revocable Living Trust Dated Apr 18, 18
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentatice ruling is adopted: ASSIGNEE NDS, LLC'S MOTION TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE ANDREW KEK H. LIM AND E. FRANCISCO MAYREN AS TRUSTEES OF THE ANDREW KEK H. LIM AND E. FRANCISCO MAYREN REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST DATED APRIL 18, 2016 is continued to October 9, 2018 per agreement of all parties via email dated 8-28-18.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/HEK)
